name: Power Backend
description: Backend companion plugin for power-ui directory browsing and project workspace helpers.

roots.label: Allowed Roots
roots.help: Server directories that power-ui is allowed to browse when selecting a project workspace.

terminal.enabled.label: Enable Terminal
terminal.enabled.help: Allow power-ui to create shell terminals through the gateway.

terminal.shell.label: Shell Path
terminal.shell.help: Shell executable used for each terminal session, for example /bin/zsh.

terminal.defaultCwd.label: Default Terminal Directory
terminal.defaultCwd.help: Fallback working directory for new terminal tabs.

terminal.claudeCommand.label: Claude Wrapper Command
terminal.claudeCommand.help: Command exposed as `claude` inside power-ui terminals.

terminal.idleTimeoutMs.label: Terminal Idle Timeout (ms)
terminal.idleTimeoutMs.help: Inactive terminal sessions are closed after this many milliseconds.

terminal.historyMaxChars.label: Terminal History Buffer
terminal.historyMaxChars.help: Maximum number of output characters retained per terminal for page refresh recovery.
